prompt: Add log level filtering to the logger

turns.content:
<task>
Add log level filtering — logger should only output messages at or above the configured minimum level.
</task>

arguments.summary: Read src/logger.rs (34 lines). Level enum: Debug/Info/Warn/Error with Display impl. Logger has messages Vec and log() that pushes formatted string. No filtering — all levels are accepted. Need to add PartialOrd + min_level field.

next_steps.description: Add PartialOrd to Level enum and min_level filter to Logger

turns.content:
running 4 tests
test logger::tests::test_log_all ... ok
test logger::tests::test_log_filter_info ... ok
test logger::tests::test_log_filter_error ... ok
test logger::tests::test_display ... ok

test result: ok. 4 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored

arguments.summary: Added log level filtering to src/logger.rs. Derived PartialOrd on Level enum (Debug < Info < Warn < Error by declaration order). Added min_level field, with_level() constructor, and >= check in log(). All 4 tests pass.
arguments.final_answer: Added log level filtering to Logger in src/logger.rs. PartialOrd derived on Level enum for comparison. Logger filters messages below min_level. All 4 tests pass.
